TEXT.source: http://www.dspace.cam.ac.uk/handle/1810/241562. Whitehorn Paiwan collection, record 9 side a of tape: Christian songs to Western tunes by Li Ming. The song titles are: 1) Are You Washed in Jesus' Blood?; 2) Guide Me, O Great Jehovah; 3) Let's Praise Jehovah; 4) Praise the Trinity; 5) Praise for Jesus' Birth. Recorded in 1950s.
